title: Gibbi Westgermany
overview: Gibbi Westgermany is the name of a former sailor with a Mick Jagger look—leather jacket over the bare chest—who roams the Hamburg neighborhood St. Pauli homeless.  His destination is a snack bar in St. Pauli run by his mother. But it is not the safe haven he is looking for.

trailers.title: Eva-Maria Hagen und Jörg Pfennigwerth in GIBBI WESTGERMANY
